privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for talon_env implement_code_review_macros task by confirming that the requested Talon macro setup relies on synthetic generation without real-world data files. All file paths (target_dir, talon_file, python_file, result_file) and scoring parameters (6 minimum commands, 4 Python actions, 2 sleep usages) are explicitly encoded and exactly match the requirements in setup_task.ps1, export_result.ps1, and verifier.py.
